retry_reason: The operation always executes and never fails; retry is meaningless.
contract_summary: This function releases a stable reference on a bfq_queue. It decrements the stable_ref counter and then calls bfq_put_queue to release the main queue reference. After this call, the bfqq object must not be used again and no further put should be called on it. It is a compound put operation that releases both a stable-reference count and the underlying queue reference.
